title: Observable reconciliation lifecycle
description: Ledger must represent recorded but unreconciled, statement reconciled with confirmed-existing or corrected-from-statement detail, statement-only, recorded absent from an approved statement scope, ambiguous match, explicitly owner-confirmed match, and reconciliation exception outcomes. Current state may be derived, but every transition, authoritative replacement, scope, policy or owner actor, reason, carry-forward event, and superseded decision remains inspectable.
